title: Bonjour/ciao plugin crash-loop caused gateway crash
rootCause: Bonjour/ciao plugin entered crash-loop on gateway startup, causing repeated gateway process restarts. LaunchAgent kept relaunching the crashing process, extending downtime significantly.
impact: Full gateway outage for 116 minutes. All agent channels unavailable. Yoda unreachable via Telegram and web chat.
resolution: Batch close — incident resolved, post-mortem complete or superseded. Closed by Yoda with Ken approval 2026-05-11.
prevention: Pre-risky-op checkpoint (flush decisions, test plugins before activation). Plugin staging environment required.
